title: Alternative Energy and Conservation Pioneer Roeslein Renewables Earns International Renewable Energy Certification
content: Roeslein Renewables, a leader in alternative energy and conservation, has been awarded ISCC PLUS and ISCC EU certifications for biomass feedstocks used in renewable natural gas (RNG) production. This is the first ISCC certification for biomass-based crop residues, including cover crops, processed for clean-burning RNG.The certification represents a critical step in expanding market access for U.S.-produced RNG in fast-growing international renewable energy markets. It also opens new revenue opportunities and supports rural and agricultural economies.
author: Analysts Account
